memory:memory/2026-04-15.md:48:73.snippet: SOLUTION: User must manually enable IDE service port (Settings -> Security -> Service Port -> On) After that, CLI automation works. ### 20:27 - 小程序自动上传成功 CLI 上传最终跑通，无需任何手动操作。 关键：IDE 需保持运行（.ide-status=On，端口 21161） 命令：echo y | CLI upload ... 路径（CLI）: C:\Program Files (x86)\Tencent\微信web开发者工具\cli.js 路径（项目）: workspace\projects\writing-coach-app\miniprogram ### 21:00 - v5.0.0 Cloud + AI evaluation Major refactor: replaced all fake APIs with WeChat Cloud Development 4 cloud functions: login, goal, task, evaluate Real rule-based AI evaluation (not random anymore) Cloud database: users, goals, tasks, submissions collections Auto cloud login, data synced across devices Uploaded v5.0.0
